{{Infobox group
| name = Lirial Travelers
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Lirial Travelers]] have a stormy history with the [[Damascan]] throne.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c5">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Lirial Travelers]]' powers focus on gathering and preserving information rather than destruction.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c8">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Lirial Travelers]] are restricted to summoning items from their sanctum only when they are outside the [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
